meaning: n.倾向自我宣传的人,裸露症患者
examples: Her behavior has become exhibitionist and totally out of character.
He's 26 now, and he works a full-time job, but he's a really, really BIG exhibitionist.
So he said to the companion: Don't display! Don't become an exhibitionist, otherwise you will be in trouble.
At least he has understood that art is more demonstrative, even exhibitionist, than it was during the heyday of abstract expressionism in the 1950s.
